data.title: Commitment Struggle: Finding Time To Write
data.description: Here I'll discuss the fact that my commitment to this site has dropped off recently. Not for lack of desire to write but because life is busy and it's not always easy to do things for yourself.

data.title: How Hard Can It Be To Write A Book?
data.description: In this post I'll detail my experience of writing my first novel. With no formal writing training I just started writing one day because I wanted to. Fast forward a (very) long time and I'm now committed to seeing it through.
